subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of Eternity! The candle is bright and the flower in the meadow is radiant with lights from the horizon of the unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب الی ملکوت البقاء شمع روشن است و گل در چمن انوار است که از افق غیب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @development of capacity and readiness
